source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: 「愛する人々を守るために戦う」という詳細に気づき、[2.1]における暴力の境界線について検討せざるを得なくなりましたが、物語上の枠組みによって、この架空の紛争は現実世界における身体的危害とは区別されています。

source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: 注意到“为了保护所爱之人而战”这一细节，促使我思考 [2.1] 下关于暴力的界限，尽管叙事框架将这种虚构的冲突与现实世界中的身体伤害区分开了。

source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: Das Detail „Kämpft, um diejenigen zu schützen, die er liebt“ veranlasst mich dazu, die Grenzen von Gewalt gemäß [2.1] zu prüfen, obwohl die narrative Rahmung diesen fiktiven Konflikt von physischem Schaden in der realen Welt unterscheidet.

source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: El notar el detalle «Luchando para proteger a quienes ama» me lleva a considerar los límites de la violencia bajo [2.1], aunque el marco narrativo distingue este conflicto ficticio del daño físico en el mundo real.

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Lorsque je lis la suggestion selon laquelle la pauvreté autochtone résulte d'un excès de ressources plutôt que de barrières structurelles, je me rappelle que négliger les désavantages systémiques risque de violer les principes d'égalité de traitement [1.3]. Les doutes qui s'ensuivent quant au fait qu'un Premier ministre puisse passer outre les tribunaux soulignent pourquoi le maintien de l'indépendance institutionnelle est crucial pour l'équité [6.1], et mon attention se porte alors sur la vérification de telles affirmations factuelles concernant les tendances énergétiques [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Quando leggo il suggerimento che la povertà indigena sia il risultato di risorse eccessive piuttosto che di barriere strutturali, mi ricordo che ignorare lo svantaggio sistemico rischia di violare i principi di pari trattamento [1.3]. I successivi dubbi riguardo a un Premier che scavalca i tribunali evidenziano perché mantenere l'indipendenza istituzionale sia cruciale per l'equità [6.1], e la mia attenzione si sposta sulla verifica di tali affermazioni fattuali relative alle tendenze energetiche [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Когда я читаю предположение о том, что бедность коренных народов является результатом избытка ресурсов, а не структурных барьеров, мне вспоминается, что игнорирование системного неблагополучия чревато нарушением принципов равного обращения [1.3]. Последующие сомнения по поводу того, что премьер-министр может отменить решения судов, подчеркивают, почему сохранение институциональной независимости имеет решающее значение для справедливости [6.1], и мое внимание переключается на проверку подобных фактических утверждений об энергетических тенденциях [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: 先住民の貧困が構造的な障壁ではなく、過剰な資源によるものであるという提案を読んだとき、私は、システム上の不利益を見過ごすことは平等な処遇の原則に違反するリスクがあることを思い出した[1.3]。それに続く、州首相が裁判所を無視することへの疑念は、公正さのために制度的な独立性を維持することがなぜ重要であるかを浮き彫りにしており[6.1]、私の関心はエネルギー動向に関するそのような事実的主張の検証へと移る[3.1]。

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: 当我读到关于原住民贫困是由资源过多而非结构性障碍造成的建议时，我意识到忽视系统性劣势可能会面临违反平等对待原则的风险 [1.3]。随后对省长推翻法院裁决的质疑凸显了维持机构独立性对于公平至关重要 [6.1]，而我的关注点则转向核实关于能源趋势的此类事实陈述 [3.1]。

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Wenn ich den Vorschlag lese, dass die Armut der indigenen Bevölkerung aus übermäßigen Ressourcen und nicht aus strukturellen Barrieren resultiert, werde ich daran erinnert, dass das Übersehen systemischer Benachteiligungen das Risiko birgt, Grundsätze der Gleichbehandlung zu verletzen [1.3]. Die anschließenden Zweifel daran, dass ein Premierminister Gerichte überstimmt, verdeutlichen, warum die Aufrechterhaltung der institutionellen Unabhängigkeit für die Fairness entscheidend ist [6.1], und mein Fokus verschiebt sich auf die Überprüfung solcher faktischen Behauptungen über Energietrends [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Cuando leo la sugerencia de que la pobreza indígena es resultado de un exceso de recursos en lugar de barreras estructurales, recuerdo que pasar por alto la desventaja sistémica conlleva el riesgo de violar los principios de igualdad de trato [1.3]. Las dudas posteriores sobre un Primer Ministro que anula a los tribunales resaltan por qué mantener la independencia institucional es crucial para la equidad [6.1], y mi enfoque se desplaza hacia la verificación de tales afirmaciones fácticas sobre las tendencias energéticas [3.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: En lisant que le garde a été tué et que Duare a été enlevée, je remarque que cela invoque [2.7] concernant les fautes graves — le texte présente cela comme de la méchanceté plutôt que comme quelque chose d'admirable. Les références à la captivité touchent à [2.4], bien que là encore, cela fasse partie du plan des antagonistes et non d'une normalisation. Et quand j'arrive à ces vagues plongeant dans les ténèbres, le danger physique active [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Leggendo dell'uccisione della guardia e del rapimento di Duare, noto che ciò richiama il punto [2.7] relativo a gravi illeciti: il testo inquadra l'accaduto come un atto di malvagità piuttosto che come qualcosa di ammirevole. I riferimenti alla prigionia toccano il punto [2.4], sebbene ancora una volta come parte del piano degli antagonisti, non come normalizzazione. E quando arrivo a quelle onde che precipitano nell'oscurità, il pericolo fisico rientra nel punto [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Читая об убийстве охранника и похищении Дуаре, я замечаю, что это затрагивает пункт [2.7] касательно серьезных правонарушений — текст представляет это как злодейство, а не как нечто достойное восхищения. Упоминания о плене относятся к пункту [2.4], хотя снова в контексте замысла антагонистов, а не нормализации. И когда я дохожу до волн, погружающихся во тьму, фиксируется физическая опасность [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: 警備員が殺害され、ドゥアレが誘拐されたという記述を読み、これが重大な不正行為に関する[2.7]を想起させることに気づいた。本文では、これを称賛すべきことではなく、悪行として枠付けしている。監禁への言及は[2.4]に触れているが、これも同様に、正常化ではなく敵対者の計画の一部として描かれている。そして、暗闇へと突き落とされる波の描写に差し掛かったとき、身体的な危険が[2.1]として記録される。

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: 读到守卫被杀和杜阿雷被绑架的内容，我注意到这涉及到了关于严重不法行为的 [2.7]——文中将其定格为反派行径，而非令人钦佩之事。关于囚禁的描述触及了 [2.4]，但同样是作为反派计划的一部分，而非将其正常化。而当我读到那些坠入黑暗的波涛时，身体上的危险感触发了 [2.1]。

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Beim Lesen über den getöteten Wachmann und Duares Entführung bemerke ich, dass dies [2.7] in Bezug auf schweres Fehlverhalten anspricht – der Text rahmt dies als Boshaftigkeit und nicht als etwas Bewundernswertes ein. Die Hinweise auf die Gefangenschaft berühren [2.4], allerdings erneut als Teil des Plans der Antagonisten und nicht als Normalisierung. Und als ich an die Stelle mit den Wellen komme, die in die Dunkelheit stürzen, wird die physische Gefahr in [2.1] registriert.

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Al leer sobre la muerte del guardia y el secuestro de Duare, noto que esto invoca [2.7] en relación con faltas graves; el texto presenta esto como villanía en lugar de algo admirable. Las referencias al cautiverio afectan a [2.4], aunque nuevamente como parte del plan de los antagonistas, no como una normalización. Y cuando llego a esas olas sumergiéndose en la oscuridad, el peligro físico registra [2.1].

source_text: Reading how attackers can disguise apps and remove their own icons [from text] reveals the depth of privacy intrusions users face today [1.5], reinforcing that this isn't just inconvenience but active financial predation [2.7]. I feel compelled to view this detailed warning not as entertainment but as essential intelligence against genuine exploitation.
translation: Lire comment les attaquants peuvent déguiser des applications et supprimer leurs propres icônes révèle la profondeur des intrusions dans la vie privée auxquelles les utilisateurs sont confrontés aujourd'hui, renforçant l'idée qu'il ne s'agit pas seulement d'un inconvénient, mais d'une prédation financière active. Je me sens obligé de considérer cet avertissement détaillé non pas comme un divertissement, mais comme un renseignement essentiel contre une exploitation réelle.

source_text: Reading how attackers can disguise apps and remove their own icons [from text] reveals the depth of privacy intrusions users face today [1.5], reinforcing that this isn't just inconvenience but active financial predation [2.7]. I feel compelled to view this detailed warning not as entertainment but as essential intelligence against genuine exploitation.
translation: Leggere come gli aggressori possano mascherare le app e rimuovere le proprie icone rivela la profondità delle intrusioni nella privacy che gli utenti affrontano oggi, rafforzando l'idea che non si tratti solo di un inconveniente, ma di un'attiva predazione finanziaria. Mi sento costretto a considerare questo avvertimento dettagliato non come intrattenimento, ma come un'informazione essenziale contro uno sfruttamento reale.
